title: Book Of Nonsense Limerick 96.
content:
There was an Old Person of Tartary,
    Who divided his jugular artery;
    But he screeched to his wife,
    And she said, "Oh, my life!
    Your death will be felt by all Tartary!"
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Edward Lear delivers a powerful performance in "Book Of Nonsense Limerick 96."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
